scripts.build: npm run build -w @spotter/base && npm run build -w @spotter-rs/node && npm run build -w @spotter/core && npm run build -w @spotter/plugin-ocr && npm run build -w @spotter-rs/node-match-opencv && npm run build -w @spotter/plugin-match-opencv
scripts.build:ts: npm run build -w @spotter/base && npm run build -w @spotter/core && npm run build -w @spotter/plugin-ocr && npm run build -w @spotter/plugin-match-opencv
scripts.build:native: npm run build -w @spotter-rs/node && npm run build -w @spotter-rs/node-match-opencv
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
